content:
Tried Arc 2, 3-6 to experience some Vortice gameplay (and thinking she would be great against Fran).
But encountered a weird interaction; her Exalt wasn't removing Fran's Fortress, (or Fran was instantly getting it back).
Seems like a bug.

My Vortice and the replay if ppl want to check.
(Please ignore missplays lol)
